description: You are a business intelligence analyst building an integrated view that correlates regional sales performance with employee workforce data using `sales_data.csv` and `employee_performance.csv` located at `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\`. Create a Power BI report saved as `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Integrated_Analysis.pbix` that integrates these datasets. The employee table requires a new conditional column named `Region` to bridge city names to regions (New York and Philadelphia to East; Chicago to North; Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas to South; Los Angeles, Phoenix, San Diego, and San Jose to West; all others to 'Other'). Establish a relationship between the tables using this `Region` column and define a DAX measure named `Sales_Per_Head` as `DIVIDE(SUM(sales_data[Sales_Amount]), COUNTROWS(employee_performance), 0)`. The report page 'Integrated View' must contain a Scatter Chart showing average Salary versus total Sales_Amount by Region, and a Matrix visual showing Region as rows with Sales_Amount and average Performance Score as values. Login: user is `Docker`, no password required.
